title: rubus trichocarpus
intro: Rubus trichocarpus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan and Tibetan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus trichocarpus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant can be found in the form of extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
